rule.description: Detected a Malicious Access to lsass Process
Legitmate lsass Process - Built-in Windows Processes
Legitmate lsass Process - Symantec Endpoint Protection

rule.field: C:\\\\Program Files\\\\Kaspersky Lab\\\\Kaspersky Endpoint Security for Windows\\\\avp.exe|C:\\\\Program Files \(x86\)\\\\Kaspersky Lab\\\\Kaspersky Endpoint Security for Windows\\\\avp.exe

C:\\\\Windows\\\\system32\\\\wow64cpu.dll\p\.+\|C:\\\\Windows\\\\system32\\\\wow64.dll\p\.+\|C:\\\\Windows\\\\SYSTEM32\\\\ntdll.dll\p\.+\|C:\\\\Windows\\\\system32\\\\FLTLIB.dll\p\.+\||C:\\\\Program Files \(x86\)\\\\Kaspersky Lab\\\\Kaspersky Endpoint Security for Windows\\\\system_interceptors.dll\p\.+\|\.*|C:\\\\Windows\\\\SYSTEM32\\\\ntdll.dll\p\.+\|C:\\\\Windows\\\\system32\\\\wow64.dll\p\.+\|C:\\\\Windows\\\\system32\\\\wow64cpu.dll\p\.+\|C:\\\\Windows\\\\system32\\\\wow64.dll\p\.+\|C:\\\\Windows\\\\SYSTEM32\\\\ntdll.dll\p\.+\|C:\\\\Windows\\\\system32\\\\KERNELBASE.dll\p\.+\|C:\\\\ProgramData\\\\Kaspersky Lab\\\\KES\\\\Bases\\\\Cache\\\\kavsys.kdl.\w+\p\.+\|\.*|C:\\\\Windows\\\\SYSTEM32\\\\ntdll.dll\p\.+\|C:\\\\Windows\\\\system32\\\\wow64.dll\p\.+\|C:\\\\Windows\\\\system32\\\\wow64cpu.dll\p\.+\|C:\\\\Windows\\\\system32\\\\wow64.dll\p\.+\|C:\\\\Windows\\\\SYSTEM32\\\\ntdll.dll\p\.+\|C:\\\\Windows\\\\system32\\\\KERNELBASE.dll\p\.+\|C:\\\\ProgramData\\\\Kaspersky Lab\\\\KES\\\\Bases\\\\Cache\\\\klavasyswatch.dll.\w+\p\.+\|\.*|C:\\\\Windows\\\\SYSTEM32\\\\ntdll.dll\p\.+\|C:\\\\Windows\\\\system32\\\\wow64.dll\p\.+\|C:\\\\Windows\\\\system32\\\\wow64cpu.dll\p\.+\|C:\\\\Windows\\\\system32\\\\wow64.dll\p\.+\|C:\\\\Windows\\\\SYSTEM32\\\\ntdll.dll\p\.+\|C:\\\\Windows\\\\system32\\\\KERNELBASE.dll\p\.+\|C:\\\\Program Files \(x86\)\\\\Kaspersky Lab\\\\Kaspersky Endpoint Security for Windows\\\\processmonitor.dll\p\.+\|\.*
rule.description: Legitmate lsass Process - Kaspersky Endpoint Security
Legitmate lsass Process - Microsoft Office Update
Legitmate lsass Process - HP Agentless Management Service
Detected a Malicious Access to lsass Process from Unknown Call Trace
Legetimate Azure Service - Detected a Malicious Access to lsass Process from Unknown Call Trace
Detected a Registry Dump For SAM or System Key
Detected a Registry Dump For SAM or System Key
Created a Thread into lsass Process on events
Legitimate Thread into lsass Process on events
Legitimate Thread into lsass Process on events
SAM Registry key Has Been Accessed - using regedit
Detected Mimikatz Based on IMP Hash
Detected a Remoting Service Connected to Lsass Pipe
Lsass Process Connected to a Pipe
Repeated same Windows user locked out
PSRemoting lateral movement by PowerShell Execution
Legit Windows Service Persistence - Windows Driver Foundation
Legit Windows Service Persistence - Symantec install component
Detect command line run by wmic
Detect command line run by wmic

rule.field: PipelineRoot:\\"c:\\\\Program Files \(x86\)\\\\Common Files\\\\Microsoft Shared\\\\VSTA\\\\Pipeline.v10.0|AddInRoot:\\"C:\\\\Program Files \(x86\)\\\\Common Files\\\\Microsoft Shared\\\\VSTA\\\\AppInfoDocument

certutil.exe\s+-store Root|-addstore\s+Root|-addstore \\"Root\\"|Symantec\\\\Symantec Endpoint Protection Manager\\\\bin\\\\Xdelta64\\\\xdelta3.exe|C:\\\\Program Files\\\\Windows Defender Advanced Threat Protection\\\\SenseNdr.exe

rule.description: Legitimate Microsoft Teams Update - Detect dll run by regsvr32
Legitimate Squirrel Windows software - Detect dll run by regsvr32
Legitimate Squirrel Windows software - Detect dll run by regsvr32
Legitimate Teams addinloader.dll - Detect dll run by regsvr32
Leguitimate - Detect dll run by regsvr32
Leguitimate - Detect dll run by regsvr32
Leguitimate Alibaba TradeManager - Detect dll run by regsvr32
Leguitimate Firefox Process - Detect dll run by regsvr32
Leguitimate Intel Driver - Detect dll run by regsvr32
Leguitimate Intel Driver - Detect dll run by regsvr32
Sophos Update - Detect dll run by regsvr32
Sophos Update - Detect dll run by regsvr32
Checkpoint Endpoint Security Update - Detect dll run by regsvr32
Process Loaded Executable from Temp Directory - $(win.eventdata.imageLoaded)
Legitmate Process Loaded Executable from Temp Directory
Legitmate Process Loaded Executable from Temp Directory
Legitimate - Process Launched From Temp Directory
Legitmate File Hash From Temp Directory
Legitmate File Hash From Temp Directory
Legitmate Veeam Backup - From Temp Directory

rule.field: CrowdStrike\.*|Dropbox\.*|Google LLC|Lenovo Group Limited|Logitech\.*|LogMeIn, Inc|Veeam Software.*|Zoom.*
rule.description: Legitmate Company Signed Process Loaded - From Temp Directory

rule.field: C:\\\\Windows\\\\TEMP\.*dismhost.exe|C:\\\\Program Files \(x86\)\\\\Dropbox\\\\Update\\\\Install\\\\|C:\\\\Program Files\\\\Common Files\\\\Logitech\\\\|C:\\\\Program Files \(x86\)\\\\TeamViewer\\\\Update\\\\update.exe|C:\\\\Program Files \(x86\)\\\\Common Files\\\\microsoft shared\\\\VSTO\\\\100.00\\\\VSTOInstaller.exe

rule.description: Legitmate Source Image From Temp Directory
Legitmate Parent Image - From Temp Directory
Legitmate Parent Command Line - From Temp Directory
Legitmate Adobe Processes (1) - From Temp Directory
Legitmate Adobe Processes (2) - From Temp Directory
Legitmate Teamviewer Processes - From Temp Directory
Legitmate Telegram Processes - From Temp Directory

rule.field: wmic os get locale|wmic\.exe os get locale

rule.description: Whitelist Whatsapp app for wmic command

rule.field: \Wnmap.exe|\Wnmap\W|net.exe\.+time|qprocess|whoami.exe /all|whoami.exe /priv|net group "Domain Admins" /do|net group "Enterprise Admins" /do|sc config|netsh wlan| tftp |cmd /c powershell.exe
\Wnmap.exe|\Wnmap\W|net.exe\.+time|qprocess|whoami.exe /all|whoami.exe /priv|net group "Domain Admins" /do|net group "Enterprise Admins" /do|sc config|netsh wlan| tftp |cmd /c powershell.exe

rule.description: Detect suspicious Windows commands - reg.exe add
Whitelist Lenovo Scheduled Update Suspicious Command
Legitmate HPSupportSolutionsFrameworkService - Detect malicious Windows command execution
Legitmate HPSupportSolutionsFrameworkService - Detect malicious Windows command execution
Solarigate Technique: Dumping of ADFS Certificate using ADFSDump/ADFSpoof
Solarigate Technique: Dumping of ADFS Certificate - Certifcate exported
Solarigate Technique: Malicious ADFS Trust Modification
Solarigate Technique: Dumping of ADFS Certificate - Name pipe suspicious access
Leguitimate Teams Driver - Detect dll run by regsvr32
Detect Suspicious Event for PS Channel

rule.field: C:\\\\Program Files\\\\Windows Defender Advanced Threat Protection\\\\MsSense.exe|C:\\\\Program Files\\\\Windows Defender Advanced Threat Protection\\\\SenseNdr.exe
C:\\\\Program Files\\\\Windows Defender Advanced Threat Protection\\\\SenseNdr.exe
C:\\\\Program Files\\\\Windows Defender Advanced Threat Protection\\\\SenseNdr.exe

rule.description: [Whitelist] Detect command line run by wmic

rule.field: add HKLM\\\\Software\\\\Policies\\\\Microsoft\\\\Windows\\\\Powershell\\\\ScriptBlockLogging /v EnableScriptBlockLogging /t REG_DWORD|add HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\\\\SOFTWARE\\\\Microsoft\\\\Windows\\\\CurrentVersion\\\\Policies\\\\System\\\\Audit /f /t REG_SZ /v ProcessCreationIncludeCmdLine_Enabled = 1|add HKLM\\\\Software\\\\Microsoft\\\\Windows\\\\CurrentVersion\\\\Policies\\\\System\\\\Audit\\\\ /v ProcessCreationIncludeCmdLine_Enabled /t REG_DWORD /d 1 /f
rule.description: [Whitelist] Detect suspicious Windows commands - reg.exe add

local computer to local administrators group

Detected Potential CVE-2020-1472 Netlogon Denied Connection

AD FS 1102 event - Not real log cleared
Changing an Account Password Attribute to Never Expire
Changing an Account to Disable Normal Account
Changing an Account Password Attribute to Not Required
Changing an Account Password Attribute to Encrypt Text Password
Changing an Account to Enable Server Trust Account
